category_sources: source_facts.description says fakesteak is an ASCII Matrix-like steak demo.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives the package/project name as fakesteak.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface available.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an ASCII terminal demo; source_facts.executables lists fakesteak as a CLI executable.
